description: Label-prefix registry for paradata image nodes (AuthorNode, AuthorAINode, LicenseNode, EmbargoNode, GraphNode). The primary detection signal in the GraphML importer is the label prefix of a <y:ImageNode> (longest-first to avoid 'AI.' being shadowed by 'A.'). Explicit '_s3d_node_type:<NodeType>' marker in the node description/URL overrides everything and is used by the exporter for round-trip stability. Hash-based detection has been removed because palette icons may be redrawn / reshipped between versions; the label convention is instead stable across the EM ecosystem and matches how ExtractorNode (D.) and CombinerNode (C.) are identified. v1.6.0 adds 'G.' for GraphNode (the top-level graph container introduced in s3dgraphy node datamodel v1.6.0 — anchor for graph-wide metadata like default author, license, embargo).
